name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). 7 bundled profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Researcher / Watch Party / Auction Watcher) + 13 Quick Style moods (Brutalist / Zen / Retro CRT / Executive / Neon / Hacker / Glacier / Midnight / Featherlight / Industrial / Trading Floor / Scholar / Samba). 14 major exchanges (NYSE · TSX · B3 · LSE · Euronext · XETRA · SIX · JSE · TSE · HKEX · SSE · KRX · NSE · ASX) covering all populated continents, grouped by region (Americas / Europe / Africa / Asia / Oceania) via iana-prefix detection. Live 5-state session tracking (OPEN · LUNCH · PRE-MARKET · AFTER-HOURS · CLOSED) — amber ◐ dawn + rose ◒ dusk auction signals, gated by SessionSignalWindow (off / 5-60 min, Quick-Style-composable). Rocket-launch T-HH:MM:SS countdown (progressive to T-Nd Hh MMm at ≥24h). Urgency-tiered green/amber/red. Tabulated sections with frosted-glass. Clipboard snapshots with self-documenting UTC-stamped headers via per-segment Copy actions. /floating-clock:diagnose slash command for health reports. Reveal App in Finder + Copy Time/Active/Next menu utilities. Aesthetic surface: 28 color themes · 12 progress-bar glyphs · 8 corner styles · 7 shadow presets · 7 segment-gap presets · 7 font weights (thin → black) · 7 letter-spacing values · 7 line-spacing values · 7 time-separator glyphs · 6 density profiles · 5-phase sun/moon glyph · global + per-segment FontWeight/Transparency · 9 DateFormat locales. **v1.12 headline: interactive UX polish + canonical UI naming + auto-sizing layout**. Double-click LOCAL to collapse bottom blocks (animated 150ms) — double-click again to restore. ACTIVE + NEXT blocks now auto-size their heights independently to measured content (no more MAX-coupling that over-padded the shorter segment); label frames are exactly content-sized with deterministic `pad/2` top+bottom inset symmetry (no magic numbers — derived purely from NSLayoutManager measurement + user-chosen Density pad). Every UI section has a canonical short name surfaced as a tiny bottom-left overlay — `[LOCAL]` / `[ACTIVE]` / `[NEXT]` — so feedback can be precise (
). NSToolTip covers every labeled element with a full description. ShowDebugLabels defaults YES — the corner labels ARE the section identifier now (verbose

titles removed in favor of the compact [ACTIVE]/[NEXT] labels). Also v1.12: 29th color theme (Aurora cyan-green on indigo) + 14th Quick Style mood (Borealis) + 8th starter profile (Arctic) + 2 new progress-bar glyphs (waves ≋ ∼, chevrons ❯ ›) + half-day session campaign — 8/14 exchanges now model early-close (NYSE Black Friday + Xmas Eve 13:00 ET; LSE Xmas Eve + NYE 12:30 London; XETRA + Euronext same dates 14:00 local via shared TARGET2 array; HKEX LNY Eve + Xmas Eve + NYE 12:00 HKT with hasLunch=NO override; TSX Dec 24 13:00; JSE + ASX Dec 24 12:00/14:10). Transparency bug fix: setCanvasOpacity now clears per-segment overrides so the global slider acts as override-all; activateProfile clean-slates managed keys. 84 fixtures total (15 holiday, 5 half-day). Sub-0.1% idle CPU, ~224 KB signed binary.
